meta.title: Send Letters to Boot Camp Using Sandboxx
meta.description:
Sending Letters to recruits in training has never been easier. Sandboxx allows friends and family to write and send Letters to boot camp directly from their phone.

Sandboxx Letters are shipped overnight via FedEx to all boot camp locations. 

Learn more about how Sandboxx works:
https://link.sandboxx.us/how-does-sandboxx-work

Download Sandboxx:
https://link.sandboxx.us/onxiGOLlpS
